{0} is looking for a fight!

Press <color=yellow>WASD</color> to complete key sequences
Press <color=yellow>SPACE</color> to switch between banks

<color=blue>DEFEND</color> - Complete before time runs out to avoid taking damage
<color=red>ATTACK</color> - Complete to deal damage

Press <color=yellow>SPACE</color> to begin...
Your health is constantly draining!\nUse the Arrow Keys to complete the HEAL sequence and restore health!
Your health is constantly draining!\nUse the WASD keys to complete the HEAL sequence and restore health!

Good! Now you can switch between the HEAL and ATTACK banks

Press SPACE to change to the ATTACK bank
Complete an attack sequence!

Good! Now you can switch between the HEAL and ATTACK banks

Press SHIFT to change to the ATTACK bank
Complete an attack sequence!

Good! Now you can switch between the HEAL and ATTACK banks

Press SPACE to change to the ATTACK bank
Complete an attack sequence!

Good! Now you can switch between the HEAL and ATTACK banks

Press SHIFT to change to the ATTACK bank
Complete an attack sequence!

Ready for the real fight?

Both banks run at the same time
Attack but make sure to heal before your health runs out!

This is your first day at the magical tavern.

You'll be mixing drinks for fantastical customers.

Press SPACE to continue through the day.
This Mood Graph helps you understand your customer's needs!
Use the bases to guide drink to the correct mood. For this frog, looks like he wants to be calmed. Let's try moonshine!
Now that we have the right liquid, let's try to put in some ingredients that'll evoke the right emotions.\n\n Let's give this frog a wishbone!

For the final touch, lets throw in a topping!

 This will usually match the characters themselves rather than their mood.

 Slimey frog gets the lime!
Congratulations! you have made the perfect brew for Frog!
Slow down though! It won't always be so easy to please your customers..
